dict.string: SUBQUERY(extensionItems, $e, SUBQUERY($e.attachments, $a, ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.plain-text" || ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.text" || ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.utf8-plain-text" || ANY $a.registeredTypeIdentifiers UTI-CONFORMS-TO "public.file-url").@count >= 1).@count >= 1
